title: NoPotionSwirls
description: Disables the rendering of potion swirl particles to reduce visual noise.
body:
![Before/After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8bca38412fbbd962f31465e4cc2198cf71ade00.png)

**No Potion Swirls** is a simple client-side mod dedicated to enhancing your visual experience by removing the swirling potion effect particles that often create distracting visual clutter.

It's perfect for content creators seeking clean cinematic shots, builders who want to admire their work without obstruction, or any player who prefers a more minimalist and immersive aesthetic.

## Features

*   **Highly Configurable:** Take full control over which particles you see. A simple in-game config lets you choose:
    *   **All:** Remove potion swirls from every entity for a completely clean view.
    *   **Self Only:** Hide your own particles to clear your first-person perspective while still seeing effects on others.
    *   **Others Only:** Keep your own status indicators visible while removing the clutter from other players and mobs.

*   **Seamless Replay Compatibility:** Works perfectly with mods like **Flashback**, ensuring your recorded replays are as pristine and particle-free as your live gameplay.

Reclaim your screen and enjoy a more serene and visually focused Minecraft world.
